ORDER OF STATUS HEARING

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-08-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-13-2022 Continued To Aug-08-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Executor Wilhelmina V. Gabriel and Attorney Benjamin H. Ballard to appear on Aug-08-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date. If either of the previously mentioned petitions is filed by Jul-28-2022, the Order to Appear set for Aug-08-2022 will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-09-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Benjamin Ballard, via ZOOM, counsel for Wilhelmina Gabriel, Petitioner; Melody Rissell, via ZOOM, counsel for Grace Tamayo, Petitioner and Teresita Hilario, Creditor.

At the outset, the court advises counsel that it is inclined to admit the lost will to probate and appoint petitioner Wilhelmina Gabriel as Administrator accordingly. The court confirms if there is any objection to the preceding. None are presented. Ms. Rissell reports that her client has no issues with the preceding, however, confirms her clients wishes that the Administrator properly serve as such. Mr. Ballard provides oral testimony to support his client's petition.

After additional discussion, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The Lost will dated October 30, 1995 is admitted to probate. Wilhelmina Gabriel is appointed as Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 13, 2022, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The competing Petition for Letters of Administration is denied in open court.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-09-2021 Denied
